sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 41:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 41:1
items.html: Because the vessels of straightness have a screen and coarseness, they are fit to draw the upper light and bestow upon others. A light that has bestowal in it is called a “light of Ruach” or “male light.” (Part Two, Chapter Two, Inner Light, Item 30)
